title: palah #6395
definition:
1) to be distinct, marked out, be separated, be distinguished
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be distinct, be separated, be distinguished
        1a2) to be wonderful
    1b) (Hiphil) to make separate, set apart
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be distinct, marked out, be separated, be distinguished
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be distinct, be separated, be distinguished
        1a2) to be wonderful
    1b) (Hiphil) to make separate, set apart

    NASB:  to be separated or distinct
